# Fractals Web

Fractals Web is the web version of the original fractals project by Aarti S Ravikumar.

## Purpose
A modular visual science workbench for students, educators, and researchers.

## Key Pages
- http://localhost:5173
- http://localhost:5173/workbench/fractals
- http://localhost:5173/workbench/discover
- http://localhost:5173/workbench/box-count
- http://localhost:5173/workbench/compare
- http://localhost:5173/workbench/tumor-detection
- http://localhost:5173/workbench/runs

## Summary
Use this site to explore fractals, compare image evidence, document reproducible analysis, and share results.
